en: Can I just say no to your kind request and leave it at that?
ko: 당신의 친절한 요청을 그냥 거절하고 말할 수 있을까요

en: Fine, of course, I... Of course.
Well, I'll just be going then. It was nice to see you.
ko: 물론요 그럼 나 그냥 가볼게 음 그럼 만나서 반가웠어 그런 거

en: The thing is, with you I'm in real danger.
It seems like a perfect situation, apart from that foul temper of yours.
But my relatively inexperienced heart would I fear not recover if I was once again cast aside as I would absolutely expect to be.
ko: 내가 다시 한 번 버림받는다면 나는 회복하지 못할 거야 그럼

en: There are just too many pictures of you, too many films.
ko: 절대적으로 기대할 수밖에 없잖아 당신의 사진이 너무 많고 영화도 너무 많아서

en: You know, you'd go and I'd be, well, buggered, basically.
ko: 당신이 가면 나는 음 그냥 망할 거야 기본적으로
